[[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation's]] '''Action V transport''' was a member of the [[Action series/Legends|Action series]] of [[Bulk transport/Legends|bulk transports]].

==Characteristics==
It was a modest upgrade of the older [[Action IV transport]]'s design. Action V freighters couldn't carry as much cargo as the newer [[Action VI bulk transport/Legends|Action VI transports]], but were also less expensive, and could be found throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] in the ownership of private individuals and freelance traders.

The Action V was the most popular of the series, despite the fact that its Class 4 [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] was slower than the Class 3 used in both its predecessor and successor.

==History==
Due to its shape, the Action V was sometimes referred to as a "flying hatbox," as [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] pointed out to [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]].
